name: Puma 180 'Corduroy - Alpine Snow Chocolate Chip'
Puma 180 Feather Grey Green Fog
Puma 180 'Felt - Team Aqua'
Puma 180 'Sk8er'
Puma 180 'Vapor Grey Navy Blazer'
Puma Clyde Jay-Z 4:44 (Friends & Family)
Puma 9-T 'White Black Gum'
Puma Inhale A$AP Rocky Black Lime Pow
story: The A$AP Rocky x PUMA Inhale 'Black Lime Pow' delivers a lifestyle sneaker inspired by motorsports. The breathable black mesh upper features a rubberized toe cap and lime green TPU 'flames.' Outlined in reflective detailing, a stitched white leather Formstrip sweeps across the side panel, while a red Flacko logo adorns the tongue. Lightweight cushioning arrives via a grey foam midsole, supported underfoot by a durable rubber outsole studded with crimson-colored lugs.

name: Puma Inhale OG A$AP Rocky Distressed Pack Cream Black
Puma Inhale OG A$AP Rocky Distressed Pack Black Pop Red
story: The A$AP Rocky x PUMA Inhale 'Black Pop Red' is drawn from the 'Distressed Pack,' a motorsport-inspired collection with the platinum-selling Harlem rapper. A pre-distressed finish is applied to the upper, built with black and red suede with embroidered flame graphics. An off-white suede Formstrip outlined in reflective piping adorns the side panel, while an embroidered 'FLACKO' logo graces the tongue. Visible scuff marks bring a weathered appearance to the compression-molded EVA midsole.

name: Puma Inhale OG A$AP Rocky Distressed Pack Alpine Snow
story: Launching as part of the 'Distressed Pack,' the A$AP Rocky x PUMA Inhale 'Alpine Snow' revives a retro running shoe from PUMA's 2000 archive. Red laces secure the pre-distressed upper, constructed from twill weave canvas in a light tan hue with embroidered flame graphics. Branding elements include a tonal suede Formstrip outlined in reflective piping and a crimson 'Flacko' wordmark atop the tongue. Underfoot, a translucent rubber outsole provides durable traction.

name: A$AP Rocky x Puma Inhale 'Leopard'
Puma Inhale OG ASAP Rocky Summer Melon
story: Dropping as part of a motorsport-inspired collection with the New York rapper, the A$AP Rocky x PUMA Inhale OG 'Summer Melon' brings back a breathable running shoe originally released in 2000. The familiar design, based on a 2019 retro release, features a cream-colored mesh upper with wavy no-sew overlays in red and black. Synthetic leather reinforces the toe and heel, while a Formstrip in gradient crimson coloring decorates the side panel. A compression-molded EVA midsole offers lightweight cushioning with every step.

name: A$AP Rocky x Puma Inhale 'Reflective Silver'
A$AP Rocky x Puma Mostro 3D 'Platinum Metallic'
Puma Mostro 3D A$AP Rocky Spikey Pop Red Black
story: Launching as part of a collaborative moto-inspired collection, the A$AP Rocky x PUMA Mostro 3D 'Spikey Pop Red Black' delivers an eye-catching slip-on that's made using a resin-based 3D printing process. A brush spray-paint design in a gradient black and red finish is executed on the synthetic upper, covered in protruding spikes and breathable perforations. A molded Formstrip decorates the medial and lateral side.

name: A$AP Rocky x Puma Mostro 3D 'Triple Black'
A$AP Rocky x Puma Mostro 'Black Croc'
Puma A$AP Rocky x Mostro 'Disccords'
A$AP Rocky x Puma Mostro Gabbia 'Black Snakeskin'

A$AP Rocky x Puma Mostro OG 'Pony Hair'
A$AP Rocky x Puma Wmns Inhale 'Reflective Silver'

Puma Accelerate Turbo 4 'Fizzy Light Green Terrain'
Puma Accelerate Turbo 4 'White Silver'
Puma Accelerate Turbo 'White Bluemazing'
Puma California Ader Error
Puma Cell Alien Ader Error
Puma Cell Venom Ader Error
Puma Platform Trace Ader Error Black (Women's)
story: Retro design and a futuristic aesthetic collide in the Puma ADER ERROR x Wmns Platform Trace sneaker—a women's contemporary take on a classic model designed in collaboration with Seoul, South Korea-based fashion label, Ader Error. Bringing a new dimension to the iconic Suede silhouette, this chunky version takes a single-tone approach to its all-suede upper, accenting its build with smooth leather formstrip overlays. Collage detailing, numbering along the eyestay and metallic silver branding add a playful twist to the design, while an oversized, platform sole elevates the shoe.

name: Puma RS-0 Ader Error Lapis Blue
Puma RS-0 Ader Error
story: Fusing modern and retro design elements, cult South Korean label and artist collective, Ader Error, team up with Puma to present a luxurious iteration of the Puma RS-0. Part of a four-sneaker collaboration released in November 2018, the Ader Error x RS-0 'Black' sneaker takes a monochrome approach to its mixed construction upper. It features a mesh and leather construction with nubuck suede overlays dressing the toe cap and eyestay. A chunky sole features Puma’s iconic Running System to promote comfort from below.

name: Puma RS-1 Ader Error
Puma RS-100 Ader Error Whisper White
Puma RS-100 Ader Error
story: The Puma Ader Error x RS-100 'Quarry Lemon' sneaker updates the iconic 80s style with a modern touch, fusing futuristic and retro influences together for a fresh, new interpretation. Part of a four-sneaker collaboration released in November 2018, this limited-edition design pairs breathable mesh underlays with luxe leather overlays. Leather trim highlights the Formstrip, while an extended TPU heel piece with a reflective insert adds a unique touch. A rubber outsole with Running System technology keeps the shoe grounded in heritage design.

name: Puma RS 9.8 Whisper Ader Error White
Puma RS-X Ader Error
story: Seoul brand and artist collective, Ader Error joined with Puma to showcase the Ader Error x RS-X 'White' in March 2019. Equipped with a mesh and textile upper with leather overlays, the sneaker celebrates a youthful influence with its multi-colored backdrop and playful aesthetic. At the back, a yellow heel counter makes a statement while along the vamp, a removable lace jewel gives the shoe some pizzazz. The running sneaker honors the renaissance of the RS cushioning system for unrelenting play.

name: Puma Suede Ader Error Taffy
story: Bringing a modern edge to an iconic sport classic, South Korean fashion label, Ader Error, teams up with Puma to create the Ader Error x Suede 'Taffy' sneaker. Part of a four-shoe collaboration released in August 2018, this contemporary take sees the classic silhouette dressed in a monochrome suede upper that’s reinforced by nylon waxed laces. Hits of iridescent blue accent the signature Puma branding on the double tongue, sidewall and heel tab, while screen-printed, descriptive text highlight the silhouette’s construction including the leather overlay ‘FORMSTRIP,’ ‘EYESTAY’ and ‘HEELCAP.’ A durable rubber outsole keeps the shoe grounded in heritage design.

name: Puma Platform Trace Ader Error Lapis Blue (Women's)
Puma Trailfox Overland Ader error
Puma RS-Connect AKA Boku
Puma Deviate Nitro 3 Alex Toussaint
Puma Deviate Nitro 3 Alex Toussaint (Women's)
Puma Clyde Hardwood Alexander John Los Angeles
story: Limited to just 150 pairs and available exclusively through Sneaker Palace, the Alexander John x Clyde Hardwood 'Hollywood' is hand painted by the noted sneaker designer himself. PUMA’s performance basketball shoe is constructed from white leather and mesh, accented with the signature hues of the Los Angeles Lakers. Details include a purple form strip and matching Hollywood-sign graphic on the lateral quarter panel, contrasted by an external heel counter in gold.

colorway: Warm White/Team Royal/For All Time Red
name: Alexander John x Emory Jones x Puma RS-XL 'The Classic Mixtape - Multi-Color'
Puma Alexander McQueen x Armes Low 'Pink'
Alexander McQueen x Puma Armes Low 'Green'
Puma Brace Mid Alexander McQueen Black White
Puma Brace Mid Alexander McQueen White Black
Alexander McQueen x Puma Deck Low 2 'Print - Snorkel Blue'
Puma Alexander McQueen Deck Lo Carmine Rose
Puma Mcq Serve Black
Puma Medius Alexander McQueen Moonless Night  (Women's)
Puma McQueen Mobe Lo Alexander McQueen
Puma Joustesse Mid II 2 Faded Rose (Women's)
Puma Blaze Of Glory OG X Alife High Rise/Dandelion
story: The ALIFE x Blaze Of Glory OG sneaker was released as part of a collaborative two-shoe drop in 2015 alongside a Disc Blaze sneaker. The style pairing was significant due to the similarities between the shoes, with the Blaze Of Glory stepping out in 1993 with the same Trinomic sole seen on the Disc. This limited-edition sneaker features a mesh and grained leather upper with primary-colored details on the heel tab and sole.

name: Puma Clyde Alife New York Navy
story: The ALIFE x Clyde ‘Blue Depths’ pays tribute to the Big Apple, home to both the retailer and the basketball legend for which the shoe is named. The low-top features a navy blue suede upper, accented with a white suede formstrip and a white rubber toe cap for added durability. “New York” is inscribed on the tongue, while ALIFE’s classic red box logo adds a shot of contrasting color on the lateral heel.

name: Puma Clyde Alife New York Green
story: The ALIFE x Clyde ‘Green Gables’ celebrates the city that’s closely connected to both the retailer and the sneaker silhouette. The collaborative design features a green suede upper, contrasted by a white suede formstrip and rubber toe cap. Unique design flourishes include “New York” lettering on the tongue and a classic red ALIFE box box logo stamped onto the lateral heel.

name: Puma Disc X Trinomic X Alife Ultramarine/High Rise
Puma Leadcat ALIFE Black
story: Teaming up with the New York-based ALIFE label, the Puma ALIFE x Leadcat Slide takes the class of the boutique and adds it to this athletic slide. Peach Puma branding stands out on the wide black leather strap, contrasting with the embossed ALIFE all-over branding splashed across it. The EVA outsole provides durability and grip, while an anatomically-shaped footbed cradles the foot, lending comfort to this casual slide.

name: Puma R698 Alife Peach
story: Puma teamed up with New York streetwear retailer Alife on this special edition R698 in 2016. The redesigned silhouette features a Peach Bud upper made up of mesh, suede, and nubuck. The tonal upper is offset by a black and blue print on the interior and a mixed blue Trinomic midsole.

name: Puma R698 X Stuck Up X ALIFE Limestone Gray/Black
Puma Suede Mid X Stuck Alife
story: NYC-based streetwear and skatewear brand, Alife, teamed up with Puma to produce a special edition of the classic Puma Suede Mid. The Alife x Stuck Up x Suede Mid sneaker features a luxurious, black suede and mesh constructed upper decorated with an allover print branded with a subtle ‘ALIFE’ logo pattern. Dual brand logos on the tongue, gold detailing and a contrasting white sole complete the look of this collaboration.

name: Puma All-Pro Nitro 2 'For All Time Red'
Puma All-Pro Nitro 2 'Hooptopia'
Puma All-Pro Nitro 2 'White Black'
Puma All-Pro Nitro 2 'White Mint Melt'
Puma All-Pro Nitro 'Black Active Red'

Puma All-Pro Nitro Primary
Puma All-Pro Nitro SQD 'Dylan Exhibit'
Puma All-Pro Nitro Sunset Glow
Puma All-Pro Nitro 'Color Tie'
Puma Alteration Core Black
story: The Alteration Core 'Black' utilizes neutral tones on a futuristic silhouette that draws inspiration from what PUMA calls an ‘imagined post-apocalyptic world.’ The upper is constructed from breathable black mesh, overlaid with a combination of grey suede and white leather paneling. The minimalist build up top is contrasted by an exaggerated two-tone EVA midsole, reinforced by a rugged rubber outsole for durable traction.

name: Puma Alteration Kurve Black Limelight
story: The Puma Alteration silhouette made its debut at Han Kjøbenhavn’s Fall Winter 2019 show during Paris Fashion Week. Arriving in a colorway that resembles the original Thunder Spectra, the Puma Alteration Kurve 'Black Limelight’ has a futuristic design with a combination of mesh, leather and suede overlays. Dropped in July 2019, the sneaker features an exaggerated midsole with Puma’s Running System technology that offers both a contemporary look and cushioned comfort.

name: Puma Alteration Kurve High Rise Black
Puma Rider FV Ami Faded Denim
Puma Slipstream Low 2 Ami White Green
Puma Slipstream Low Ami Pristine
story: Launching as part of a capsule collection with the Parisian fashion label, the AMI x PUMA Slipstream Low ‘White Pristine’ treats the ‘80s hoops shoe to a neutral makeover. White leather is utilized on the upper, accented with a tonal stitched Formstrip and fortified with off-white suede overlays. Mismatched heel tabs feature PUMA’s jumping cat icon and AMI’s hear logo stamped in red, while both elements are integrated on dual-branded tongue tags. Underpinning the low-top is a durable gum rubber outsole.

name: AMI x Puma Slipstream Low 'White Pristine' Sample
Puma Slipstream Mid Ami
story: The AMI x PUMA Slipstream Mid ‘White Pristine’ is taken from a capsule collection with the Parisian fashion brand. The vintage ‘80s silhouette features a white leather upper with a tonal stitched Formstrip and off-white suede overlays throughout the toe, midfoot, and heel. The sneaker’s monochrome color palette is disrupted by black zigzag stitching and a woven tongue tag that displays dual PUMA and AMI branding. Underfoot, a gum rubber outsole provides grippy traction.

name: Puma Suede Crepe Ami Pristine
story: The AMI x PUMA Suede Crepe ‘Pristine’ makes over the sneaker icon with a retooled build. The Parisian fashion brand updates the low-top with a genuine crepe sole, replacing the traditional rubber cupsole of the original. The upper is constructed from tan suede with a reinforced toe cap and a green leather Formstrip. Matching green leather is utilized on the heel overlay, featuring mismatched AMI and PUMA branding. Both logos are repeated on oversized woven tongue tags.
